title: Dance and Recreational Gymnastic Coach
description:
Responsible for delivering engaging, safe, and age-appropriate recreational gymnastics and dance classes. The role focuses on developing basic movement skills, coordination, rhythm, and confidence while creating a positive and enjoyable learning environment for students.

Key Responsibilities:

Coaching & Instruction

  • Conduct recreational gymnastics and dance classes for children of various age groups.
  • Teach basic dance techniques, rhythm, musicality, coordination, and movement skills.
  • Introduce fundamental gymnastics elements, flexibility, balance, and body control.
  • Adapt lesson plans to suit different abilities and learning styles.
  • Assist the RG Coach when needed.


Programme Delivery

  • Follow BPA’s curriculum and lesson plans while maintaining class quality and consistency.
  • Assist in planning and preparing class structures, routines, and simple performances.
  • Support studio showcases, demonstrations, and internal events.


Student Care & Safety

  • Ensure a safe training environment and adhere to all safety guidelines and procedures.
  • Monitor students’ progress and provide constructive feedback.
  • Maintain discipline and positive classroom management.

Communication & Teamwork

  • Communicate professionally with parents regarding student progress and class matters.
  • Work closely with coaches, instructors, and administrative staff.
  • Support enrolment activities, trial classes, and open house events when required.
  • Support enrolment activities, trial classes, and open house events when required.

Administrative & Operational Support

  • Take attendance and assist with basic administrative duties related to classes.
  • Ensure equipment, music, and training spaces are properly set up and maintained.
  • Comply with BPA policies, SOPs, and code of conduct.

postedCompany.description:
Who We Are

The Bianka Panova Sport and Art Academy was founded in 2015 in Singapore with the clear mission of providing the young upcoming talents with the highest levels of artistic and professional gymnastics training. Our Co-founder and Creative Director, Ms. Bianka Panova, is an Olympian and a nine-time World Champion in Rhythmic gymnastics. She has made significant contributions to the European rhythmic gymnastics and dancing world, as well as local.


What We Do

All students here in Singapore can now benefit from the opportunity to be trained at the highest levels of this beautiful sport brought to them by the Academy. Ever since the Academy’s inception, we have participated in several international competitions, representing Singapore on the world stage. Our students have achieved great success in China, Malaysia, Taiwan, Germany, and Netherlands. Hopefully this is just the first short chapter of our long journey in Singapore.
postedCompany.name: SG GYMNASTIC ACADEMY PTE. LTD.
